name: McKinley Acquisition Corp
summary: PART I Our Company We are a newly formed blank check company, incorporated on March27, 2025, as an exempted company under the laws of the Cayman Islands. Our purpose is to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or other similar business combination with one or more operating businesses (which we refer to throughout this report as our initial business combination).
